positive: An elegant, stylized illustration of a roaring golden retriever head portrait combined with abstract geometric floral elements. The dog's silhouette should be crisp and central, radiating joy and loyalty. The background features complex, symmetrical Mandalas made of stylized leaves, stylized geometric stars, and flowing ribbon motifs, rendered in deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream tones. The overall style is a blend of Art Deco poster art and modern bohemian minimalism, emphasizing strong linework, flat color blocks, and high contrast. Composition is perfectly centered and balanced, ideal for repeating apparel print. Use a graphic, vector-art quality, ensuring sharp edges and clean separation of elements.
negative: blur, low detail, fuzzy, ugly, noisy, watermark, signature, text, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photography, photorealistic, poor composition
